list.name: Changes
list.comment: static rendering is working for VWF! Still work to do, but it's progress!

task.summary: Added a routine that gets the character widths for each font tile.
Added many changes and new script files.
refined the translation. working on vwf

Huge changes. Folded in some very old stuff to supplement the most recent breakthroughs. Fixed some script bugs. The text rendering is currently broken. Working on DMA code and the current rendering is broken. Rethinking the VWF buffer layout and rendering.
VWF is partially working without crashing. Control codes are not implemented. width map is very wrong, but I am optimistic.
Updated disassembly documentation. Changed Charley's name spelling. Changed Kurukuru to Spiral for obvious reasons. Updated various documents.
static rendering is working for VWF! Still work to do, but it's progress!

MESSAGE.value: Added a routine that gets the character widths for each font tile.
Added many changes and new script files.
refined the translation. working on vwf

Huge changes. Folded in some very old stuff to supplement the most recent breakthroughs. Fixed some script bugs. The text rendering is currently broken. Working on DMA code and the current rendering is broken. Rethinking the VWF buffer layout and rendering.
VWF is partially working without crashing. Control codes are not implemented. width map is very wrong, but I am optimistic.
Updated disassembly documentation. Changed Charley's name spelling. Changed Kurukuru to Spiral for obvious reasons. Updated various documents.
static rendering is working for VWF! Still work to do, but it's progress!

option.name: LAST_COMMIT_MESSAGE
option.value: static rendering is working for VWF! Still work to do, but it's progress!
